steps.title: Find what the passage requires
steps.content: The passage says Navajo Nation communities at different elevations experience different climate conditions. The blank must supply a July temperature example that shows a meaningful contrast between two locations.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice and pick the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'the lowest temperature for both Cameron and Teec Nos Pos was 65°.': Both locations share the same value — this shows similarity, not difference. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Tuba City’s average highest temperature was 94°, while Teec Nos Pos’s was 93°.': The two figures are nearly identical, and the values misrepresent the table anyway. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Ramah’s average highest temperature was 83°, while Cameron’s was 99°.': A 16° gap between two Navajo Nation locations directly illustrates the climate variation the passage describes. ✓
  • Choice D — 'the lowest temperature for both Ramah and Tuba City was 50°.': Again, identical values show similarity rather than the required contrast. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
